pending.body: Guard the new stale-running reconciliation path in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:1453-1502` against clobbering a newer run. Both new branches call `mark_running_run_interrupted()`, but that helper rereads `run.json` and unconditionally rewrites any still-`Running` snapshot at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:755-782` without checking that it is the same `(run_id, started_at)` attempt that was just classified as stale. Two overlapping `run resume` invocations can therefore race: one invocation starts a fresh run, while the slower invocation still holding the stale preflight view marks that new run as `Failed`, removes its pid file, and may append a bogus interruption event. Thread the expected attempt identity into `mark_running_run_interrupted` (or do a compare-and-swap before rewriting) and add a regression that simulates concurrent resumes.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 13 -> Plan and Implement
